sections.paragraph:
fut. יִצְרף-

(1) to melt a metal (kindred are סָרַף, שָׂרַף), specially to purge gold or silver by fire, and to separate from dross, Psa 12:7 Isa 1:25. Part. צֹרֵף a goldsmith, Jud. 17:4 Isa 40:19 Pro 25:4.

(2) metaph. to prove, to examine any one (δοκιμάζειν), Psa 17:3 26:2 105:19 also to purge, Dan 11:35. Part. pass. צָרוּף sincere, pure, Psal. 18:31 119:140 .

Niphal, to be purified, Dan 12:10.

Piel, part. מְצַרֵף a goldsmith, Mal 3:2, Mal 3:3.
